sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array_cross_product (id INTEGER, arr1 FLOAT[], arr2 FLOAT[]);
INSERT INTO test_array_cross_product (id, arr1, arr2) VALUES (1, array_value(1.0::FLOAT, 2.0::FLOAT, 3.0::FLOAT), array_value(2.0::FLOAT, 3.0::FLOAT, 4.0::FLOAT));
UPDATE test_array_cross_product SET arr2 = array_value(4.0::FLOAT, 5.0::FLOAT, 6.0::FLOAT) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, array_cross_product(arr1, arr2) AS cross_product FROM test_array_cross_product WHERE id = 1;
